headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles with a 17-1 victory, led by Willson Contreras' 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. The Seattle Mariners rallied to defeat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9, with Nathan Church hitting 2 home runs and driving in 4 runs. The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, including Detroit Tigers right-handed pitcher Connor Seabold, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation. The Cleveland Guardians have also placed RHP Shawn Armstrong on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026, due to a right groin strain. Other teams have also reported injuries, including the New York Yankees, Cincinnati Reds, Toronto Blue Jays, Chicago Cubs, and Toronto Blue Jays.

The Toronto Blue Jays have made a trade, acquiring catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash. The Seattle Mariners have traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs have acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. The Houston Astros have traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come from Behind to Win 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to defeat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9, with Nathan Church leading the offense. Church hit 2 home runs and drove in 4 runs in the game.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins 6-2**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense. Schmitt hit 2 home runs, drove in 2 runs, and went 3 for 3 at the plate.

top_news.title: **Tigers RHP Connor Seabold Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers right-handed pitcher Connor Seabold has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Willie MacIver in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers, who received cash in return.
